name: sentinel
description: The pre-release security gate for any repository. SENTINEL catches PII, secrets/credentials, and supply-chain risk before they ship. It runs parallel, multi-agent audits across data files, git history, source code, and frontend, then consolidates findings into a single severity-ranked report with an overall PASS / REVIEW / BLOCK verdict. Runs standalone on any project, or serves as the SECURITY gate for the foundry plugin when both are installed. Carries a self-improvement covenant: every missed pattern becomes a rule, every false positive becomes an exclusion.

metadata.note: skills/ and commands/ are auto-discovered from the plugin root. /security-gate is the consolidated entry point; foundry calls it as its SECURITY station when sentinel is installed.
